meta.title: AG Grid: A Fast, Powerful, and Flexible Vue Data Grid
meta.description: Explore AG Grid's fast, powerful, and customisable Vue Data Grid library. Add high-performance Vue Data Grids to your Vue 3 applications in minutes, for free.

sections.heading: Fast, Powerful and Flexible Vue Data Grids
sections.subHeadingHtml: Add high-performance, feature rich, and fully customisable Vue Data Grids to your application in minutes, all for free.

sections.tag: Why Use AG Grid to Build Vue Data Grids?
sections.heading: Amazingly Fast and Fully Customisable with an Unbeatable Feature Set
sections.subHeading: Get started in minutes and access 1000s of features without compromising on performance. Customise your Vue Data Grid with your own styles and components or upgrade to enterprise to use our advanced features.

features.heading: Value Mapping
features.detail: Map data to columns using field or valueGetter. Format values with valueFormatter for display.

features.heading: Cell Components
features.detail: Add buttons, checkboxes, or images to cells with custom cell renderers.

features.heading: Column Resizing
features.detail: Resize columns by dragging header edges. Use flex values for responsive column widths.

features.heading: Filtering
features.detail: Built-in column filters with text, number, and date types. Add floating filters for quick access.

features.heading: Cell Editing
features.detail: Enable inline editing with text, number, date, and select editors. Supports undo/redo.

features.heading: Row Selection & Pagination
features.detail: Select single or multiple rows with checkbox selection. Paginate large datasets with configurable page sizes.

features.heading: Theming
features.detail: Choose from built-in themes (Quartz, Alpine, Balham) or create custom themes with the Theming API.

features.heading: Cell Styles
features.detail: Apply dynamic styles to cells based on values using cellClassRules for conditional formatting.

features.heading: Row Styles
features.detail: Style entire rows based on data values with rowClassRules for visual indicators.

features.heading: Integrated Charts
features.detail: Create and customize charts directly from grid data. Users can build their own visualizations.

features.heading: Row Grouping & Aggregation
features.detail: Group rows by columns with automatic aggregations. Users can drag columns to group dynamically.

features.heading: Tool Panels
features.detail: Side panels for columns and filters let users customize their view without code changes.

sections.tag: Where Can I See AG Grid Vue Data Grids Being Used?
sections.heading: Used in Every Industry, for All Types of Data
sections.subHeading: Trusted by 90% of Fortune 500 industries from Finance and AI, to DevTools and Aeronautics. Most of these uses are private, but we've hand-picked a few open-source examples:

sections.headingHtml:
Loved By Developers
Trusted By The Worlds Largest Enterprises
sections.subHeadingHtml: Over 90% of the Fortune 500 build Vue Data Grids using AG Grid, with 1,000,000+ npm downloads per week and over 12,000 Stars on GitHub.

sections.tag: How Do I Build a Vue Data Grid with AG Grid?
sections.heading: Get Started with Vue Data Grid Examples
sections.subHeading: We have a range of examples, tutorials and documentation to help you start building your first Vue Data Grid with AG Grid.

items.content: Create your first Vue Data Grid and learn the basics in just a few minutes.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.subHeading: Answers to some commonly asked questions when building Vue Data Grids with AG Grid

items.question: What is the difference between AG Grid Community and Enterprise?
items.answer: [AG Grid Community](./getting-started/) is the free version with basic features, while [AG Grid Enterprise](/license-pricing/) offers additional advanced features and support.

items.question: Can I create a Vue Data Grid for free?
items.answer: Yes, you can create a Vue Data Grid for free using our open-source library, [AG Grid Community](./getting-started/).

items.question: Will my Vue Data Grids be compatible with AG Charts?
items.answer: Yes, AG Grid is designed to be compatible with AG Charts, allowing seamless integration between Vue Data Grids and [Vue Charts](https://www.ag-grid.com/charts/vue/quick-start/).

items.question: Can I customise the Vue Data Grid?
items.answer: Yes, you can customise AG Grid [themes](./themes/) with CSS, create your own custom themes, and use your own Vue components in cells. Visit our [Theme Builder](/theme-builder/) to start customising themes.

items.question: Does AG Grid support Vue 3?
items.answer: Yes, AG Grid fully supports Vue 3 with the `ag-grid-vue3` package. It works seamlessly with Vue 3's Composition API and script setup syntax.

items.question: Can I use AG Grid with Nuxt?
items.answer: Yes, AG Grid works with Nuxt. Check our documentation for guidance on integrating AG Grid into your Nuxt application.

items.question: How Many Rows Can AG Grid Handle?
items.answer: AG Grid can easily handle millions of rows and thousands of columns, with no performance degradation, by using row & column virtualisation.

items.question: What is AG Grid Enterprise?
items.answer: [AG Grid Community](./getting-started/) is the free version with basic features, while [AG Grid Enterprise](/license-pricing/) offers additional advanced features and support.

items.question: What is an AG Grid licence?
items.answer: An AG Grid licence is required to use [AG Grid Enterprise](/license-pricing/) in production. Try it for free, or [request a trial licence](./community-vs-enterprise/#request-a-30-day-enterprise-bundle-trial-licence) to remove the watermark & console messages.

items.question: How much does AG Grid cost?
items.answer: [AG Grid Community](./getting-started/) is free forever. [AG Grid Enterprise](/license-pricing/) costs $999 USD per licence. Visit the [Pricing page](/license-pricing/) for more information.
